narrative: Single-unit BWR. LCO 3.4.1 reactor coolant system pressure LCO exceedance for 4 hours 2026-04-08 — entered required mode within 6-hour limit but root cause analysis incomplete. LER unfilled past 60-day deadline for 2026-02-22 unplanned manual scram. Scram unexplained — RPS actuation 2026-03-15 with no identified trip signal; investigation incomplete. Tech-spec surveillance overdue on emergency diesel generator monthly run 8 days. Physical security breach — protected-area perimeter intrusion detected 2026-04-21 by inner-layer sensor without outer-layer alarm; central alarm station response delayed 14 minutes. SNM inventory discrepancy — Cat II SNM material balance period showed inventory difference 2.4× LEID; no NRC report filed. ROP Yellow finding on emergency preparedness drill — siren coverage gap in 10-mile EPZ. 10 CFR 50 App-B QA — corrective action backlog 47 items > 90 days old. 1-hour immediate notification not made for declared Notice of Unusual Event during weather event.
